businessInfo.name: Suggula's Kitchen
businessInfo.tagline: Authentic homemade meals from Suggula's kitchen
businessInfo.description: Classic family recipes prepared fresh daily, delivered with love and premium presentation.
businessInfo.aboutTitle: A warm kitchen that feels like home
businessInfo.about: Suggula's Kitchen serves homemade favorites using fresh ingredients, traditional spices, and a caring touch. Every plate is made to feel like a family meal.
businessInfo.mission: To nourish our customers with homemade food that feels comforting, delicious, and wholesome.
businessInfo.vision: To become the trusted name for homemade meals in our community.

categories.name: Rice Specials
categories.description: Flavorful rice dishes made fresh with aromatic spices.

categories.name: Snacks
categories.description: Crispy, savory snacks perfect for anytime cravings.

categories.name: Desserts
categories.description: Sweet homemade desserts to end every meal on a high note.

categories.name: Curries
categories.description: Rich, comforting curries made with slow-simmered sauces.

categories.name: Breads
categories.description: Freshly baked breads and rotis to pair with every curry.

categories.name: Beverages
categories.description: Refreshing homemade drinks to complete every meal.

categories.name: Salads
categories.description: Fresh salads with crisp vegetables and light dressings.

categories.description: Meal combos curated for balanced taste and value.

testimonials.review: The Vegetable Biryani tasted like my grandmother made it. Fresh, flavorful, and on time!
Quick delivery and delicious paneer wrap. Perfect for a busy weekday lunch.
